title: The Revolutionary King
content:
I've just finished reading "The Revolutionary King":http://www.amazon.com/exec/obidos/redirect?tag=thoughtsbox-20%26link_code=xm2%26camp=2025%26creative=165953%26path=http://www.amazon.com/gp/redirect.html%253fASIN=1841194514%2526tag=thoughtsbox-20%2526lcode=xm2%2526cID=2025%2526ccmID=165953%2526location=/o/ASIN/1841194514%25253FSubscriptionId=0EMV44A9A5YT1RVDGZ82 and I have to say that the book is a *must read*. Can't say much, the matters are too sensitive to discuss up here. So let's say, grab a copy if you can find one.

4.5/5
